assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 57 of claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 59-65 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Product Lifecycle' with all 5 fields: '- Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle', '- Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT', '- Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200', '- Component label pattern: pscomponent:', '- VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 67-71 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Version Streams' with a table row: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 73-78 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Source Repositories' with table rows: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend | upstream |' and '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui | upstream |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains: '## Repository Registry' (line 20), '## Jira Configuration' (line 28), '## Code Intelligence' (line 36) with '### Limitations' (line 49), and '## Bug Configuration' (line 52).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 52-56 of claude-md-result.md contain '## Bug Configuration' with: '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 47-70 of discovery-log.md contain '## Step 10 — Security Configuration' with 'User was asked whether to enable security triage. **User accepted.**' and subsequent subsections documenting Product Lifecycle fields collected (Step 10.1), Version Streams collected (Step 10.2), and Source Repositories collected (Step 10.3).

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: Line 3 of changes-log.md states 'All sections below were **newly added** to CLAUDE.md (no prior Project Configuration existed).' The log then lists all sections: '# Project Configuration' (section 1), '## Repository Registry' (section 2), '## Jira Configuration' (section 3), '## Code Intelligence' (section 4), '## Bug Configuration' (section 5), and '## Security Configuration' (section 6) — all marked as newly added.
